holdings.infoBox: IQDY is an equity ETF with a total of 239 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 4.19%, MediaTek at 2.81%, Tokyo Electron at 2.67%, Samsung Electronics at 1.97%, and Novo Nordisk at 1.90%.

overview.description: The FlexShares International Quality Dividend Dynamic Index Fund (IQDY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks an index of non-US companies from developed and emerging markets selected and weighted by dividend yield and other fundamentals. The index aims for higher market risk. IQDY was launched on Apr 12, 2013 and is issued by FlexShares.
infoTable: Northern Trust International Quality Dividend Dynamic Net
